    • applyPlaceholders

      public static String applyPlaceholders(String message)
      Replaces placeholder tokens (e.g. %yellow%) with their ANSI counterparts. Unknown tokens are left untouched to avoid corrupting the message.

    • getPlaceholders

      public static Map<String,String> getPlaceholders()
